Sustainability call puts L'Air Liquide (ENXTPA:AI) in focus

L'Air Liquide (ENXTPA:AI) has scheduled a special call on 30 March 2026 to present its 2025 sustainability results, drawing attention to how its environmental goals intersect with its industrial gases and engineering activities.

Preferred P/E of 30.9x: Is it justified?

L'Air Liquide currently trades on a P/E of 30.9x, which puts a clear premium on its €188.54 share price compared with many chemicals peers.

The P/E ratio compares the share price with earnings per share, so a higher figure usually signals that investors are willing to pay more for each € of current earnings. For a mature industrial gases and engineering group with global operations, a premium P/E often reflects expectations for consistent cash generation, earnings growth and a perceived level of resilience.

Here, the P/E of 30.9x is described as expensive relative to both the estimated fair P/E of 25x and the wider European chemicals industry average of 18x.
